meaning: int.引人注意,表示惊讶,满足 symb [化]钬 Ho(holmium)
examples: Shops in Ho Chi Minh City are stacked with goods.
Senate Republicans are less gung-ho about tax cuts.
But these new firms are so gung ho to do business, they'll take anyone.
Ho hum, not exactly a unique occurrence in the human condition but better admitted than not.
